reasoning: Your current limiter is lactate clearance, which is critical when preparing for the sustained climbs of the Alpine Loop. The last ride indicated some recovery, so we'll tackle this directly with over-unders. This builds your ability to sustain and recover at threshold, crucial for climbs like Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 sets of 10-minute intervals (5 mins at 201W-218W, 5 mins at 242W-256W), with 2-minute recovery at 55%. Repeat.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
